summary: Comprehensive testing of venue search enhancement features. All 22 backend tests passed. All frontend features working correctly - landing page hero search, city cards, featured venues, VenueDiscovery page with search/filters/city pills.

features_tested.backend_api_venues_cities: PASS - Returns 5 cities with counts: Bengaluru(5), Chennai(4), Mumbai(3), Hyderabad(2), Delhi(2)
features_tested.backend_api_venues_areas: PASS - Returns areas, filtered by city works (Chennai returns Adyar, T Nagar, Velachery, OMR)
features_tested.backend_api_venues_amenities: PASS - Returns 13 amenities with counts (Parking:15, Floodlights:11, etc)
features_tested.backend_api_venues_filters: PASS - city, area, sport, search, min_price, max_price, amenity, sort_by all work
features_tested.landing_hero_search: PASS - Search form, input, button all present. Navigates to /venues?q=<query>
features_tested.landing_popular_city_links: PASS - 5 city quick links in hero section (Bengaluru, Chennai, Mumbai, Hyderabad, Delhi)
features_tested.landing_browse_by_city: PASS - 6 city cards with venue counts + All Cities card
features_tested.landing_top_rated_venues: PASS - 6 featured venue cards with rating, price, location
features_tested.venue_discovery_search: PASS - Search input filters venues by name/area/city in real-time
features_tested.venue_discovery_city_pills: PASS - City pills with counts, click filters venues, visual selection state
features_tested.venue_discovery_filters_panel: PASS - Expandable panel with Area, Sport, Price, Amenity filters and Sort select
features_tested.venue_discovery_venue_cards: PASS - Cards show sport badges, area/city location, rating, price, amenity pills, turf count, bookings
features_tested.venue_discovery_card_navigation: PASS - Clicking venue card navigates to /venues/{id}
features_tested.venue_discovery_url_params: PASS - URL params like ?city=Mumbai pre-select filters
features_tested.venue_discovery_no_results: PASS - Shows 'No venues found' message for invalid searches
features_tested.player_dashboard_quick_search: PASS - Search widget with input and button, navigates to /venues?q=<query>

notes: Landing page redirects logged-in users to dashboard - this is correct behavior
Featured venues on landing page navigate to /auth for logged-out users - correct auth guard

frontend_tests: Browse by City section present - PASS
City cards present (6 including All Cities) - PASS
Search bar and input present - PASS
City pills with counts present - PASS
Expanded filters panel with all dropdowns - PASS
Results count updates with filters - PASS
Venue cards show area location - PASS
PlayerDashboard quick search widget works - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: Excellent implementation with comprehensive data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
URL params properly sync with filter state for bookmarkable/shareable search results
Area field properly included in all venue cards for location-based browsing
16 venues across 5 cities with proper area data provides good coverage for testing
seed_data_creation: 16 venues across 5 cities (Bengaluru: 5, Chennai: 4, Mumbai: 3, Hyderabad: 2, Delhi: 2) with area fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Venue search enhancements fully tested and working. New endpoints /api/venues/cities, /api/venues/areas, /api/venues/amenities all operational. VenueDiscovery page has full filter support (city pills, area/sport/price/amenity dropdowns, sort, search). Landing page has hero search bar, browse by city section with venue counts, and top rated venues. PlayerDashboard has quick venue search widget.

mocked_apis.Razorpay payment gateway: MOCKED - Using mock-confirm endpoint instead of real Razorpay
